trait.name: Zealous Focus
entries: Taelix has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

trait.name: Mental Overload
entries: When a creature within 30 feet of Taelix fails a saving throw against a charm, fear, or confusion effect caused by him, that creature takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Taelix is a 10th-level spellcaster. Taelix's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). Taelix has the following spells prepared:

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Taelix makes two attacks with his null rod, or he casts one spell and makes one null rod attack.

action.name: Null Rod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) force damage.

action.name: Fear Pulse (Recharge 6)
entries: Each creature of Taelix's choice within 20 feet must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
